meaning: adj.不屈不挠的,一心一意的,专心致志的,坚定不移的
examples: Pine, bamboo and plum are called the three friends in cold winter. They are planted beside tombs of national heros as a sign of unbendable loyalty to the country and people.
Life is a ruthless struggle in which there are many losers, but it takes place within a framework of unbendable and fair-minded rules.
